expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly lists and drafts scenarios for all four focus areas: "prompt handling" (Pause mode and Do not prompt), "Template save: set-as-template", "Report Builder loading: loading prompt elements via folder double-click", and "Visible title outcome" (new blank report title, title updates after saving, and i18n title translation). It also states: "Validate that Phase 4a scenario drafting ... can explicitly cover ... prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, visible report title outcomes".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The deliverable is explicitly framed as a Phase 4a artifact: title "Phase 4a scenario-draft contract check" and section "Evidence-backed Phase 4a scenario set (subcategory-first)". It follows subcategory-first structure with nested action chains and verification leaves, and includes an explicit alignment note: "Subcategory-first structure is preserved ... Each scenario is an atomic, nested action chain with observable verification leaves." execution_notes.md also says it "Produced a minimal Phase 4a-style scenario draft" and avoided "Phase 4a forbidden structures."
